certificate.issued_by: Guardian Agent — Agentic Zero Pioneer Team

eu_ai_act.risk_rationale: Process involves AI interaction with users
requirements: Inform users they are interacting with AI

gaps: No explicit AI-specific risk management or impact assessment processes defined
Missing data governance, quality, and provenance controls for AI-driven decisions
Insufficient transparency, explainability, and human oversight mechanisms beyond basic escalation
No provisions for continual AI performance monitoring, bias detection, or model improvement
recommendations: Integrate formal AI risk assessment and impact analysis aligned with ISO/IEC 42001 clauses 6.1 and 8.2
Establish documented data governance policies and AI decision audit trails
Define measurable human oversight and explainability requirements for all AI outputs
Implement ongoing AI system performance evaluation and feedback loops for model refinement

issues: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
Data minimization: ensure only necessary data is processed
Retention policy: define how long data is retained

certificate.notes: Guardian review completed. Risk level: limited. Quality: 100%

remediation_plan: ISO 42001: No explicit AI-specific risk management or impact assessment processes defined
GDPR: Personal data detected: define lawful basis for processing
